title: あなたと歩くことができたなら

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After not seeing her at the tryouts, I find Rice Shower crying near a
stump.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Um, I'm sorry, but... could you not get any closer?
choice_data_list: Why not?
Why not?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Because... I only bring misfortune upon the people around me. I'll
weigh you down... I'm just a nuisance...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to be useful, to be strong... I was going to give it my all and
enter a race, but in the end...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking at Rice Shower crying in front of me, I think back to when I
saw her the other day.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Nuh-uh, I have to try even harder!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I already made up my mind to enter the upcoming tryouts. I'll actually
enter, actually run, and then...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll make my debut and win a bunch of races... Then, I won't be a
burden anymore!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know the details, but I do know that she was trying to change
herself for the better. She was training harder than anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sob... sniffle... I'm... I'm nothing more than—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can't leave her like this!
choice_data_list: Rice Shower, I want to scout you!
Rice Shower, I want to scout you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: By scout, you mean... You want to be my trainer?
choice_data_list: Only if that's what you want too.
Only if that's what you want too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... I-I'm, um... very, very happy, but!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm... just a good-for-nothing, you know? I only cause trouble for
others, and I can't even enter a race I signed up for...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Knowing all that, do you still want me?
choice_data_list: I want to help you move past all that.
I want to help you move past all that.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wow... Just like a real big brother...
choice_data_list: Big brother?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wow... Just like a real big sister...
choice_data_list: Big brother?
Big sister?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah! N-never mind, forget that!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But, um, if you're sure... then let's get along, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'll give it everything I have!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wiping away her tears, Rice musters all her strength and flashes me a
warm smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for my first training session with Rice. I'm already at the track
waiting for her.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice appears, lugging an enormous backpack stuffed to bursting. She
drops it by the edge of the track and runs over to me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... S-sorry for the wait! I'm looking forward to today's training!
choice_data_list: What's up with the luggage?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ah, um... They're all insurance in case bad things happen while we're
here. Like bandages, or sports tape...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention an umbrella in case it rains, a change of clothes, and
of course—mayonnaise if we get stranded on the way back!
choice_data_list: B-better safe than sorry, I guess?
B-better safe than sorry, I guess?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ah... I-it's our first training session after all, so I wanted to make sure I
didn't mess things up... Am I being weird?
choice_data_list: Mess things up?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Mhm. Ever since I was little, I've been causing all kinds of misfortune.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The kids around me would trip, their shoelaces would tear, and
sometimes even bird poop would land on their heads...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm a hopeless girl who causes trouble for others...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They all sound like unlucky accidents to me, but I guess she's the kind
of person who feels responsible for things like that.
choice_data_list: (She really is a kind and caring soul...)
(She really is a kind and caring soul...)

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah! I've been talking too much again! I'm so, so, so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Let's just start training already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite being our first training session, Rice diligently completes the
entire training menu I prepared for her.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Um... how was my time?
choice_data_list: Faster than expected! I'm super impressed!
Faster than expected! I'm super impressed!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Really?! Th-that's a relief!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um... Trainer, do you mind if I go for another run? I-I'm still full of
energy!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I want to work some more on that technique you taught me for
running around curves.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I feel like I'm getting the hang of speeding up my pace! I-is that a no?
choice_data_list: Not at all—go for it!
Not at all—go for it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Rice being eager and quick to learn, we finish today's
training without a single problem.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah... M-Mr. Sun is already going to bed...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I didn't notice at all until now... I was just so happy to be running.
choice_data_list: I'm glad you had fun today.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! It was super fun, really! You're so nice, Trainer... just like a
real big brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! It was super fun, really! You're so nice, Trainer... just like a
real big sister...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Growl...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Ah, ah, ahhh, I'm sorry! Miss Tummy, shhh—I said shhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To commemorate an amazing first training session, I decide to treat
her to dinner.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer, is it really okay for me to get anything I want?
choice_data_list: It's on me, so don't be shy!
It's on me, so don't be shy!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Anything I want! Anything... anything, hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following her gaze, I see a huge banner in front of a ramen shop that
reads, "Mega Mountain Deluxe."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Not wanting to waste a single second, I suggest that we head inside.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
With that, the Mega Mountain Deluxe is sold out for today! Please
come back again tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah! Oh...
choice_data_list:
Rice, go ahead and order every topping on the
menu!

Rice, go ahead and order every topping on the
menu!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: R-really?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with smiles and surprisingly large bellies, our first day of
training comes to an end.
